exceptions.reason: The advisory affects the optional serve-static subpath on Windows. easyeda-mcp-pro does not serve files through @hono/node-server.
exceptions.reachability: @modelcontextprotocol/sdk@1.29.0 imports getRequestListener from the package root for Node.js/Web Standard request conversion. The vulnerable serveStatic implementation is published as the separate @hono/node-server/serve-static export and is not imported by the SDK transport or this repository.
